originalDescription: Configure branch protection for the main branch using gh CLI or GitHub rulesets API. Requirements: squash-only merges, required status checks (build, test, format, audit), dismiss stale reviews on new commits, require conversation resolution before merge, no bypass allowed. Use `gh api` to apply rulesets programmatically and document the configuration in .github/branch-protection.md.
